data.description:
Write tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh (NEW, executable). All tests MUST fail before ci-llm-review-runner.sh exists.

## File Impact
### Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh

### Files to modify
- .test-index (add: plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh:tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh)

## Tests to include (all 10)

1. test_runner_rejects_missing_api_key
   Verify: ( ANTHROPIC_API_KEY='' bash plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh < /dev/null ); [[ $? -eq 1 ]]

2. test_runner_rejects_unknown_flags
   Verify: ( ANTHROPIC_API_KEY='x' bash plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh --unknown-flag < /dev/null ); [[ $? -eq 1 ]]

3. test_runner_exits_zero_for_empty_diff
   When stdin is empty/whitespace, runner must exit 0 printing 'No diff to review'
   Verify: ( ANTHROPIC_API_KEY='x' bash plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh < /dev/null ); [[ $? -eq 0 ]]

4. test_runner_calls_anthropic_api_with_system_prompt
   Mock curl: capture --data-raw arg to $TMPFILE; echo valid API response JSON
   Mock write-reviewer-findings.sh: echo $(printf '%064x' 0) (exactly 64 hex chars)
   Mock record-review.sh: write 'passed' to $WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR/review-status
   Assert: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$TMPFILE')); assert 'system' in d"
   All mocks in PATH-prepended temp dir

5. test_runner_extracts_json_from_markdown_fence
   Mock LLM response wraps findings JSON in triple-backtick fence
   Mock write-reviewer-findings.sh: validate stdin is parseable JSON (python3 -c 'import json,sys; json.load(sys.stdin)')
   Assert: runner exits 0 (write-reviewer-findings.sh received unwrapped JSON)

6. test_runner_reads_review_status_and_exits_nonzero_when_failed
   Mock write-reviewer-findings.sh: echo 64-char hex
   Mock curl: echo valid API response
   Mock record-review.sh: write 'failed' to $WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR/review-status
   Assert: ( ... runner < /dev/null ); [[ $? -eq 1 ]]
   Note: pass non-empty diff content so runner doesn't short-circuit on empty diff

7. test_runner_exits_zero_when_review_passes
   Mock record-review.sh: write 'passed'
   Assert: exits 0

8. test_runner_exits_nonzero_on_unknown_tier
   Mock classifier: echo '{"selected_tier":"garbage"}'
   Mock ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set
   Assert: ( ... ); [[ $? -ne 0 ]]
   Feed non-empty diff so runner reaches classifier

9. test_runner_integration_real_classifier_mocked_curl
   No classifier mock; mock only curl + write-reviewer-findings.sh
   Feed: printf 'diff --git a/foo.sh b/foo.sh\n+echo hello' | runner
   Assert: exits 0 (classifier produced valid tier)

10. test_runner_integration_real_record_review_writes_status
    No record-review.sh mock; mock curl + write-reviewer-findings.sh
    write-reviewer-findings.sh mock: write valid reviewer-findings JSON to $WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR/reviewer-findings.json, echo 64-char hex
    reviewer-findings JSON schema: {"scores":{"hygiene":4,"design":4,"maintainability":4,"correctness":4,"verification":4},"summary":"OK","findings":[]}
    Set: export WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR=$(mktemp -d) before running runner
    Run from repo root (cd $REPO_ROOT) so record-review.sh sourcing succeeds
    Assert: [$WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR/review-status] file exists after runner completes

## Mock contract
- write-reviewer-findings.sh mock: must echo exactly 64 lowercase hex chars (printf '%064x' 0)
- curl mock: capture --data-raw arg; echo {"content":[{"text":"{\"scores\":{\"hygiene\":4,\"design\":4,\"maintainability\":4,\"correctness\":4,\"verification\":4},\"summary\":\"OK\",\"findings\":[]}"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn"}
- record-review.sh mock: write specified status to $WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR/review-status

## RED verify (all tests must fail before Task 3 GREEN)
( bash tests/scripts/test-batched.sh --runner=bash --test-dir=tests/scripts --filter=test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh ); [[ $? -ne 0 ]]
data.title: [RED] Write failing tests for ci-llm-review-runner.sh
